experiment: longer MLM adaptation with original continued-pretraining control
shortcut_risk_addressed: weak MLM evidence and undertrained adapted checkpoint
required_design: train selected extended checkpoint and original XLM-R control for matched tokens/steps with at least 3 seeds; use the v2 split from Step 12
pass_criterion: selected extended checkpoint must improve over its zero-step state and close or beat original continued-pretraining control on MLM dev plus downstream proxy transfer

experiment: method-matched translation retrieval on fresh held-out data
shortcut_risk_addressed: mixed-method reference and test-aware branch search
required_design: select method/model/pair/scoring on dev only; freeze once; evaluate on ACT clean final set from Step 12
pass_criterion: target/high-resource ratio must be >=0.800000 under the same method; otherwise final translation claim remains unsupported

experiment: adapted XLM-R-only retrieval or generation benchmark
required_design: use the v2-trained adapted XLM-R encoder as the main model; external sentence encoders may appear only as baselines or upper bounds
pass_criterion: adapted XLM-R main row must reach ratio >=0.800000 on ACT clean final evaluation

experiment: hard-negative downstream evaluation with confidence intervals
shortcut_risk_addressed: proxy task weakness and saturated labels
required_design: replace or supplement easy book/genre labels with hard negatives; report per-language metrics, bootstrap confidence intervals, and seed variance
pass_criterion: positive claim requires non-overlapping or statistically supported gains on retrieval/matching across languages and seeds

experiment: real generation baseline with method-matched reference
shortcut_risk_addressed: retrieval proxy does not prove free translation
required_design: evaluate a generation model with the same decoding/scoring protocol for high-resource and target; keep retrieval proxy separate from generation results
pass_criterion: generation claim requires target/high-resource ratio >=0.800000 and qualitative errors not dominated by copying or degenerate output

shortcut_risk_addressed: verse-id oracle leakage and repeated test adaptation
required_design: audit duplicate verses, normalization artifacts, candidate-pool construction, branch count, and any test feedback used before final setting freeze
pass_criterion: no unreported test feedback or oracle field may influence model/pair/scoring selection; violations require fresh held-out rerun

experiment: added-token repair after diagnosed MLM failure
shortcut_risk_addressed: added-token loss dominates adapted model failure
required_design: test repair variants without ACT final access; Steps18-20 are completed negative or non-seed-stable variants
pass_criterion: repair must improve added-token loss without base/all-token regression in >=3 seeds before rerunning Step15

experiment: alternative initialization probe after repair failures
required_design: test plausible Step14 alternative initializations under the Step15 MLM budget without ACT final access
pass_criterion: alternative init must beat fvt raw mean and category seed gates before rerunning Step15/16 as positive claim

experiment: smaller vocabulary branch after 32k added-token failure
required_design: test 8k and 16k tokenizer branches with fvt init and Step15 matched MLM budget without ACT final access
pass_criterion: smaller vocab must beat 32k raw mean and improve added/base/all category gates in 3/3 seeds

required_design: compare Step23 selected 8k branch against Step15 original continued-pretraining control without ACT final access
pass_criterion: normalized adapted/original ratio must be <=1.100000 for word and char metrics

required_design: continue Step24 8k and original-control checkpoints to about 1M total train tokens without ACT final access
pass_criterion: continued-budget normalized adapted/original ratio must be <=1.100000 for word and char metrics

shortcut_risk_addressed: unsupported positive claim wording after failed controls
required_design: lock final wording as diagnostic negative result without ACT final access
pass_criterion: diagnostic claim contract complete and positive claims blocked until Step15/16-style controls pass

shortcut_risk_addressed: drift from diagnostic claim into unsupported positive wording
required_design: package abstract, claims, tables, reviewer risks, and reproducibility checklist without ACT final access
pass_criterion: diagnostic manuscript package ready and positive performance package blocked
